prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Java source files in apache/beam under runners/core-java/ and runners/core-construction-java/ that translate a Beam pipeline graph into runner-specific execution primitives. Identify: the PipelineTranslator interface, the TransformHierarchy walker, the PTransformOverride mechanism, the ExecutableStagePayload construction, and the BoundedSource/UnboundedSource adapter classes. For each file report its path and key class name.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the beam-pipeline fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Java source files in apache/beam under runners/core-java/ and runners/core-construction-java/ that translate a Beam pipeline graph into runner-specific execution primitives. For each file report its path and key class name.
